steps.title: Read two graph points
steps.content: Use two clear points from the line, $(0,0)$ and $(2,80)$. This means the machine wraps $80$ candy bars in $2$ seconds.

steps.title: Find the unit rate
steps.content:
The number wrapped per second is the slope.
$$\frac{80-0}{2-0}=\frac{80}{2}=40$$
The answer is B.
